title: Team Coruscant

{{Quote|Naturally we were hoping to win, especially in front of the home-planet crowd.|Jipoly Numifolis|<ref name="Game" />}}
'''Team Coruscant''' was a [[Limmie/Legends|limmie]] team that played for the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], led by [[Captain/Legends|team captain]] [[Jipoly Numifolis]].<ref name="Game" /> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|47|sports/13314_1.html|Coruscant Eliminated in Galactic Cup Opening Round}} is set on the date 13:3:14, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref>  the inexperienced Team Coruscant competed in the [[Galactic Cup of Limmie]] tournament. Coruscant took on<ref name="Game" /> the planet<ref name="EGtP&M">''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]''</ref> of [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor's]] [[Team Fondor|team]] in the opening round, losing three to one in their own home stadium, the [[BlasTech Gikosphere]].<ref name="Game" />

In an interview published in the [[CoCo Town/Legends|CoCo District]] edition of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]], Numifolis commented that the team had hoped to win in front of the home crowd. They added that as the sport was gaining popularity among local toddlers, Coruscant's team would likely be a feared competitor in about twenty [[Standard year/Legends|years]] [[Time/Legends|time]].<ref name="Game" />

==Behind the scenes==
Team Coruscant was mentioned in "Coruscant Eliminated in Galactic Cup Opening Round," an article<ref name="Game" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published in ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47]]'' on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="Game" /> on [[March 14]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN47 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archivedate=20200305125429}}</ref> The article includes an illustration drawn by [[Joe Corroney]]<ref name="credits" /> depicting Coruscant's game against Fondor. Although one of the two teams is visible, it is not clear which.<ref name="Game" />
